data.body: DONE (commit cda9841). All 6 AC met. Four divergence sources found+fixed (experiment-driven, faithful stateful fake on git-backed repo): (A) bind_confirm at inbound create — outbound re-create eliminated; (B) legacy snapshot differ no longer echoes own rebar-id:/rebar-status: write-back as outbound update (suppression at source; the two strict-xfail e2/e3 cases now pass for real); (C) status reverse-map was lexicographic inversion — imported 'In Progress'->blocked and 'Done'->cancelled (DATA BUG beyond idempotency); now canonical config.jira_to_local_status with inbound_differ parity test, rebar-status: label precedence, bridge-internal tag filtering; (D) raw ADF description dicts were stored in CREATE events and re-pushed outbound EVERY pass; now normalized. Pass profile: import pass N mutations, pass2+ = 0 (was 2N then N then 0 in 3-4 passes). Fakes updated per AC; new integration-tier tests/integration/rebar_reconciler/test_reconcile_idempotency.py (real git + real ticket CLI) closes the false-green. Validation: pytest 1330/1330, bash 98/98, probe 141/141. LIVE (authorized): shape audit (statuses covered, priority always present, descriptions ADF/None), differ(snapshot,snapshot)=0 over 993 live DIG issues, controlled create->import->verify->delete on DIG-5653: ADF normalized, binding confirmed, label write-back live-verified, outbound+inbound differs = 0 mutations; probe issue deleted.
